summary: Completed comprehensive testing of three new features: multi-language support (English/Sinhala/Tamil), CSV bulk import in admin panel, and email notifications for payment approvals. All backend functionality working correctly, frontend language switching working perfectly.
passed_tests: Multi-language support - Language selector visible with globe icon
Language dropdown shows English, Sinhala (සිංහල), Tamil (தமிழ්) options
Sinhala language selection changes UI text correctly
Tamil language selection changes UI text correctly
Language preference persists in localStorage after page reload
CSV import endpoint POST /api/admin/lessons/import-questions accepts CSV files
CSV import parses questions with correct columns structure
CSV import validates question format and returns parsed questions
Download template button present in admin lesson form
Import CSV button present in admin lesson form
Email notification backend code integrated with Resend
Payment approval triggers email notification functionality
Manual question addition in admin form working
All backend API endpoints returning correct status codes
Question generation for all modules working
